privacy.seoDescription: GDPR-compliant privacy policy for The Unlearning School.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy.

s1.body: The Unlearning School ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting the privacy of visitors and users of our website. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Romanian data protection laws.

s2.controllerLabel: The data controller responsible for your personal data is:
s2.name: The Unlearning School
s2.address: Address: 1, Aleea Pasărea în Văzduh, București, Romania

items: Contact information (name, email, phone) when you submit a form or book a call
Communication data (messages, inquiries through our contact forms)
Technical data (IP address, browser type, device, cookies) collected automatically
Usage data (pages visited, time spent, navigation patterns)
Newsletter subscription data
Respond to your inquiries and provide requested services
Schedule and manage working calls
Send newsletter updates (only with explicit consent)
Improve our website through analytics
Comply with legal obligations

s6.body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with trusted third-party service providers (email, analytics, scheduling) bound by GDPR-compliant data processing agreements.

s7.body: We retain personal data only as long as necessary or required by law. Contact form data is retained up to 2 years. Newsletter data is retained until you unsubscribe.

s8.intro: Under the GDPR you have the right to:
items: Access your personal data
Rectify inaccurate or incomplete data
Request erasure ("right to be forgotten")
Restrict processing of your data
Object to processing
Data portability
Withdraw consent at any time
s8.outro: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at hello@unlearning.ro.

s9.bodyPre: Our website uses cookies. See our

s10.outro: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Romanian National Supervisory Authority for Personal Data Processing (ANSPDCP).

cookies.seoDescription: Cookies used on The Unlearning School website.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy.

s1.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site function, provide analytics, and remember your preferences.

items.body: Necessary for the website to function. Page navigation, secure areas. The website cannot function properly without them.
Help us understand how visitors interact with the site by collecting and reporting information anonymously.
Enable enhanced functionality and personalisation, such as remembering your cookie consent preferences.

s3.body: Some cookies are set by third-party services (scheduling tools, embedded content, analytics providers). These third parties have their own privacy policies governing their cookies.

s4.body: When you first visit, you see a consent banner allowing you to accept or decline non-essential cookies. You can change preferences at any time by clearing browser cookies or via your browser settings.

s5.body: Clicking "Accept all" consents to non-essential cookies as described. Essential cookies do not require consent.

s6.body: Questions about our use of cookies: hello@unlearning.ro.

terms.seoDescription: Terms and conditions for The Unlearning School services and website.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions.

s1.body: By accessing The Unlearning School website (tuslast.lovable.app) and our services, you confirm that you have read, understood and agree to these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree with any of these provisions, please do not use the website or our services. These terms apply to all visitors, users and clients.

s2.h: 2. What we offer and how to use the site
s2.body: The Unlearning School provides consulting, training, programme design and support services around AI adoption, funding intelligence, execution readiness and corporate academy design. The content published on the site (articles, guides, maturity scores, resources) is offered for informational and educational purposes only. Accessing the platform does not create a contractual or individual advisory relationship unless we sign a separate agreement (e.g. commercial proposal, B2B contract, scope of work for a tailored programme).

s3.body: All content on this site — texts, images, logos, diagrams, programme structures, guides, assessment scores, downloadable files — is the property of The Unlearning School (or of our collaborators, with their consent) and is protected by copyright and intellectual property law. You are allowed to access, read and save the content for personal, non-commercial use. You are not allowed to: (a) copy, redistribute, edit or sell the content without our written consent; (b) use our materials on behalf of other brands, products or services; (c) reproduce the structure of our programmes, our methodology or our assessment scores in your own commercial offerings.

items: Do not send spam, do not attempt to compromise site security and do not post offensive, discriminatory or unlawful messages
Do not distribute materials that may harm the site, its users or The Unlearning School brand reputation
Do not impersonate others, do not submit false information when registering and do not use temporary email addresses to access gated resources
Provide accurate and complete information when submitting forms or enrolling in programmes
Respect the intellectual property rights of The Unlearning School and our collaborators

s5.body: The initial AI Adoption Call (30 minutes) is offered free of charge, with no obligation to contract further services. Paid engagements (programmes, training, consulting, funding proposals) are subject to separate agreements, agreed individually with each client. We reserve the right to reschedule or cancel calls with reasonable notice. For paid programmes with online payment, the specific withdrawal and refund conditions are detailed in the enrolment confirmation.

s6.body: We make significant efforts to keep the site running smoothly, but we cannot guarantee that: (a) the site will always be 100% available, fast or error-free; (b) all information will always be up to date to the second; (c) any plugin or third-party service (forms, payment processors, scheduling calendar, analytics tools) will work flawlessly across every browser or device. If you encounter technical issues, write to hello@unlearning.ro and we'll fix them as quickly as possible.

s7.bodyPre: Your data is safe with us. We comply with applicable legislation (including GDPR) and we have a clear
s7.bodyPost: you can read on the site. We do not sell, share or use your data for hidden purposes.

s8.body: Use of the site and of the published resources is at your own risk. The Unlearning School provides services on an "as is" basis, without guaranteeing specific business outcomes. We cannot be held liable for: (a) decisions you make based on the information, scores or recommendations we provide; (b) financial, operational or reputational losses indirectly resulting from the use of our resources; (c) issues caused by third-party services we reference (e.g. AI tooling vendors). To the maximum extent permitted by law, our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us for the relevant service in the past 12 months. We recommend you always exercise judgement and seek specialised professional advice where appropriate (legal, tax, compliance).

s9.body: Our site may contain links to third-party websites (partners, reference articles, data sources, recommended tools). We are not responsible for their content, privacy policies or business practices.

s10.h: 10. Changes to these terms and governing law
s10.body: We may update these terms at any time, without prior notice. We will always publish the most recent version on the site, with the revision date updated. Continued use of the site after changes means you agree to the new conditions. These Terms are governed by the laws of Romania. Any disputes shall be resolved by the competent courts in Bucharest, Romania. For any questions about these terms, write to hello@unlearning.ro.
